positive: Minimalist abstract composition using overlapping geometric shapes (circles, triangles, rectangles) in a limited palette of terracotta, slate gray, and cream. The design must emphasize negative space and clean lines. Modern art, sophisticated, Bauhaus influence, vector illustration.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, clutter, realism, gradients
